title: Refresh telemetry docs and command contracts
summary: Update READMEs, standards, references, authoring guidance, and command docs to describe the runtime telemetry contract.
scope_items: Refresh Python workspace and package README guidance for runtime telemetry.
Update affected core command docs where cross-cutting stderr or runtime-sink behavior must be discoverable.
Keep pack authoring guidance aligned with the new runtime sink contract.
done_when_items: User-facing docs describe default-on telemetry, environment controls, sink location, and fail-open behavior.
Command docs remain aligned with the implemented stdout and stderr behavior.
